name: ext-obj-s3
description: S3-compatible object storage driver for std.obj (run-os only).
docs:
S3-compatible object storage driver for X07 services.

Modules:
- std.obj.s3
- std.obj.s3.spec

Usage:
- Add dependency: x07 pkg add ext-obj-s3@0.1.1
- Prefer logical resource bindings like obj.documents rather than bucket names in code.
- Decode operation results with std.obj.s3.spec.resp_is_ok_v1 and std.obj.s3.spec.resp_ok_payload_v1.
